name: Mr. Mueller's Grand Experiment
short_description: In an engrossing interactive novel, live as the assistant to a remarkable historical figure: George Mueller, a man who witnessed orphans dying young in the streets of 1830's England and decided he would care for them, no matter the cost.
detailed_description:
In 1830’s England, living conditions for the most vulnerable members of society were horrific. Upon witnessing the plight of young orphans in his city, George Mueller decided he would throw caution to the wind and step out onto the ledge of a bold proposition: If God exists, then He would provide for Mueller as Mueller cared for the vulnerable little ones around him.

Live the first few months of this strange, impossible story as Mueller’s orphanage ceases to be a crazy dream and becomes the best kind of inspiration.



Told as a fully voice-acted novel with nine distinct endings based on your choices, with magnificent hand-drawn art and an original soundtrack, discover what drove Mr. Mueller to start one of the world's first private orphanages without any fundraising whatsoever. Will you steer the project to success, or will your influence force the orphanage to close its doors?



With a vibrant cast of characters, a wide range of settings, and surprising plot twists around every corner, the orphans of Dover, England are waiting for you!

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
